items.title: Impact is described, not quantified
items.from_resume: Responsible for developing and maintaining features for the web application using various technologies and frameworks.
items.why_it_matters: Metrics increase interview chances ~40%; make impact concrete and credible.
items.how_we_fix_it: Insert truthful metrics or scope (use approximations honestly if needed).

items.title: Bullets describe duties, not accomplishments
items.from_resume: Responsible for developing and maintaining features for the web application using various technologies and frameworks.
items.why_it_matters: Responsibility lists are generic and forgettable. Every candidate 'was responsible for' similar things. Accomplishments differentiate and prove value. This is one of the most repeated core lessons across all major resume books.
items.how_we_fix_it: Change 'Responsible for managing 3 client accounts' to 'Managed 3 enterprise accounts; expanded 2 by 28% ARR and reduced churn to <4%'.

items.title: Primary role title missing
items.why_it_matters: The headline is the highest-weight keyword line. A generic or missing title under-ranks you and hides your actual expertise.
items.how_we_fix_it: Use a specific title that reflects your actual work (e.g. 'Senior Platform Engineer' instead of 'Software Engineer').

items.title: No dedicated skills section or skills buried
items.why_it_matters: 70-85% of employers and ATS prioritize skills. Burying them only in bullets or omitting them entirely makes the resume weak for skills-based filtering.
items.how_we_fix_it: Add a clear 'Skills' or 'Technologies' section near the top or after summary, listing specific items (React, Node.js, AWS, PostgreSQL, etc.).
items.suggested_rewrite: Skills: React, Node.js, TypeScript, AWS, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes

items.title: No professional experience dates
items.why_it_matters: Dates establish duration and recency of experience. Missing dates make it impossible to evaluate career progression and tenure.
items.how_we_fix_it: Format as: 'Company — Role | Jan 2022 – Mar 2024' or 'Present' for current.
items.suggested_rewrite: Acme Corp — Senior Platform Engineer | Jan 2022 – Present
